title: Policy on apps manipulating monday.com's using a browser extension
excerpt: Does monday.com have a policy towards an app that depends on a browser extension which manipulates the monday.com user interface? A quick review of some other app marketplaces forbids this. For example, the Google Worksp…

posts.author: Roobrick (Dugald Morrow)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does monday.com have a policy towards an app that depends on a browser extension which manipulates the monday.com user interface? A quick review of some other app marketplaces forbids this. For example, the Google Workspace Marketplace app review page includes a statement:

The app doesn’t use Chrome extensions to provide functionality by manipulating the Drive HTML directly.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Roobrick - let me check in with the team on this.

-Daniel

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Roobrick!

Apologies for the late reply. Are you still running into an issue with this?

At this time, I believe browser extensions may not pass the authorization protocols for a monday app, however feel free to open up another thread with further questions if you’d like!
